LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HAROLD LIGHT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. PRO PER PLAINTIFF FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT BREACH CLAIM AND SUPPORT CLAIM FOR ACTUAL DAMAGES. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: BOB BALIAN, CSR #5220

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Continued To May-14-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HAROLD LIGHT DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiff Junho Hyon appearing in Pro Per and opposing party; Pro Per Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts sufficient to support breach claim and support claim for actual damages. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/REQ)Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Court Reporter: Bob Balian CSR 5220
